title: passerina nitida
intro: Passerina nitida, also known as the purple coneflower or blue sage, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Passerina nitida include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Passerina nitida can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
